ecus.name: steering_column

dtc_extended_data.description: Cylinder 1 misfire freeze-frame: RPM + load + coolant + speed + ignition advance
Catalyst Bank 1 efficiency below threshold — occurrence
Turbo underboost freeze-frame: RPM + load + boost target + actual + wastegate
DPF freeze-frame: soot + ash + diff pressure + last regen distance

DPF differential pressure too high — occurrence

HV battery isolation fault — occurrence counter
HV battery isolation OEM status (MEB pack diagnostic flags)

HV battery temperature sensor circuit — occurrence
AC charging coupler latch fault — occurrence
CAN bus-off freeze-frame: bus load + last error frame + node id

Catalyst Bank 1 freeze-frame: lambda b1s1 + b1s2 + RPM + load + cat temp

Idle control RPM higher than expected — occurrence

Fuel pump A control circuit high — occurrence

Transmission fluid pressure too high (DSG) — occurrence

Exhaust gas temperature sensor circuit Bank 1 — occurrence

Post-cat lambda Bank 1 too rich — occurrence
